# @uptimizr/heatmap

> Draws a world-space voxel heatmap (and a gaze dome) into the developer's own 3D scene — the
> Tier 0 overlay of ADR 0010. Framework-agnostic core with engine adapters behind subpaths.

## Docs

- [Package reference](./README.md): world heatmap, gaze dome, the pure builders, driver design, color ramp.
- [Agent guide](./AGENTS.md): rules and canonical usage for AI agents.
- [Integration & API reference](https://github.com/RaananW/Uptimizr/blob/main/docs/integration.md): the heatmap query endpoints.
- [Architecture Decision Records](https://github.com/RaananW/Uptimizr/tree/main/docs/adr): spatial 3D heatmaps (0010).

## Key exports

- `showWorldHeatmap(options)` / `showGazeDome(options)` (subpath `./babylon`) — one-call fetch + render.
- `HeatmapOverlay` / `GazeOverlay` + `buildHeatmapInstances` / `buildGazeInstances` — engine-free core.
- `createBabylonHeatmapDriver(options)` — the Babylon `HeatmapDriver`.
